progress_summary: Three rounds of build work merged. R1: extracted DesktopWorkbench, built MobileWorkbench (Direction A), CSS-breakpoint swap on /demo at 767px (#143). R2: built MobileArchitecture component, same swap pattern on /architecture (#146). R3: built WelcomePopup, deleted OnboardingTour, dropped page-summary card (full-bleed workbench), moved desktop feedback pill to top-right, restyled skill detail TOC, added click-to-flash, restored visually-hidden h1 on /demo (#148).

progress_table.label: Move desktop feedback pill to top-right

key_decisions: Single-route + CSS-breakpoint swap at 767px on both /demo and /architecture (no UA sniff, no parallel route).
Both Desktop and Mobile subtrees server-render. Inactive one is display:none → zero layout cost; modal-open delegated click handler reaches both.
Mobile components namespaced (mw-*, ma-*) so JS selectors never reach into the desktop subtree.
WelcomePopup auto-open key: localStorage `opchain-demo-welcome-seen`. Mobile skipped (MobileWorkbench Scenarios tab is its own welcome).
FeedbackWidget desktop pill: top:1rem right:1rem z-index:100. Mobile launcher (in Header.astro) unchanged.
Skill TOC: var(--subtle) at rest; .toc-rail:hover/.toc-collapse:hover descendant selector brightens to var(--text); per-link :hover wins to var(--accent). Active stays ember.
Click-to-flash uses single shared timer + reflow trick (`void el.offsetWidth`) so a rapid second click cancels and restarts cleanly.
Restored visually-hidden h1 on /demo using existing .visually-hidden utility from src/styles/global.css.
TypeScript predicate `(s): s is Extract<...>` doesn't parse cleanly inside Astro JSX — used `step.kind === 'beat' ? ... : null` instead.
HTML braces `{` `}` inside Astro markup must be entity-escaped (`{` `}`) when not part of an expression.
user_preferences: Comfortable picking defaults when given clarifying questions.

next_actions: Once /architecture and /skills/app-architect have a stable LHCI median across a few CI runs, promote their lighthouserc.cjs assertions from `warn` to `error` (matches B-01/B-08 calibration cycle for the original 3 routes).

skill_state.depends_on: ux-engineer checkpoint for design rationale; checkpoint-protocol v1.0
